OFFENSE_DESCRIPTION: PROHIBITS VIOLATIONS OF ANY EMERGENCY MEASURES ESTABLISHED BY THE MAYOR
OPERATION WHILE REGISTRATION OR PRIVILEGE IS SUSPENDED OR REVOKED
CONGREGATES WITH OTHER PERSONS IN PUBLIC AND REFUSES TO DISPERSE BY LAWFUL POLIC
UNREASONABLE NOISE; FROM ANY VEHICLE HORN
ENGAGES IN FIGHTING, OR VIOLENT, TUMULTUOUS OR THREATENING BEHAVIOR
SALE OF ALCOHOL TO A MINOR
